## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

-
-

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new tool or capability
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that doesn't add a feature or fix a bug
- [ ] `chore` — build, CI, dependency updates
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Related issue / ticket

<!-- Closes #123 or N/A -->

## Test plan

- [ ] `uv run ruff check src/` passes
- [ ] Manually tested against at least one tenant (read-only)
- [ ] No credentials or tenant data committed
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for `feat` / `fix`)
- [ ] Tool count in README / TOOL_REFERENCE updated (for new tools)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type: short description` (conventional commits)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with target branch
- [ ] No `.secrets.toml`, report files, or backup JSON committed
